title: Settings
label: Label
addsExtraWord: Adds an extra word to your seed
apiBridgeDescription: REST server for dApps and SDKs on port 1646.
onLatestVersion: You are on the latest version
advancedModeDescription: Allow signing EVM transactions with arbitrary contract data (e.g. Uniswap, DeFi).
swapsFeatureDescription: Enable token swaps via THORChain and other DEXes.
bip85FeatureDescription: Derive child seeds from your master seed for hot wallets.
zcashPrivacyFeatureDescription: Enable Zcash Orchard shielded transactions and privacy features.
wipeWarning: Wiping erases all data on the device. Make sure you have your recovery phrase backed up.
factoryResetWarning: Deletes ALL local data: cached balances, settings, API pairings, Zcash wallet, and custom tokens. Your device seed is not affected.
factoryResetQuitting: The app will quit after reset. Relaunch to start fresh.

bip85.title: BIP85 Derived Seeds
bip85.warning: Derived seeds can be recovered from your KeepKey's master seed. They are suitable for hot wallets and everyday use — not cold storage.

pairedAppsPanel.title: Paired Apps
pairedAppsPanel.noPairedAppsDescription: Apps paired via the REST API will appear here.

mobile.getTheAppDescription: Download KeepKey Mobile to view your portfolio on the go.
mobile.scanToDownload: Scan to download from the App Store
mobile.pairDescription: Sync your public keys to view balances on mobile. Private keys never leave your KeepKey.
mobile.feature1: View your full portfolio and balances from anywhere
mobile.feature2: Receive addresses for all supported chains
mobile.watchOnlyNote: KeepKey Mobile is strictly watch-only. Your private keys remain on your hardware wallet at all times.

mobilePairing.title: Pair Mobile Device
mobilePairing.derivingKeys: Deriving public keys from device — this may take a moment.
mobilePairing.scanQr: Or scan with the KeepKey mobile app
mobilePairing.step3: Scan the QR code or enter the code manually
mobilePairing.securityNote: Code expires in 15 minutes, one-time use only. Only public keys are shared — private keys never leave your device.
